title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.text:
One day, while out and about with Mihono
Bourbon...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have located some interesting dolls
approximately two meters and forty-three
centimeters ahead.

She points toward a claw machine filled with
Umamusume plushies.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
These dolls, called "Cuties," have been popular in
class recently.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
They are chiefly used as decorations on bags and
pencil cases.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
If I were to obtain one, I estimate that I could use
it to learn a new kind of "small talk." However...

Mihono Bourbon is the epitome of
technologically challenged. A claw machine is
probably too much for her to handle.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Acquisition is difficult. It would be best to give
up. I apologize for the one minute and two
seconds of lost time.
There's no way I can fail!
